mutation: composite: budget-committed candidate-edge network scored by a deterministic tick-cascade with AND-merge nodes gated on exact-tick synchronization (no known optimum: package selection under budget + tick-matching is combinatorial)
theme: Lay a toppling network with synchronized arrivals
title: Delay-Line Cascade: Synchronized Toppling Network
strategies: value/cost knapsack incl. cheapest-branch merge attempts, ignoring tick sync (greedy trap)
knapsack using TRUE min-cost synchronized merge packages via exact tick-arithmetic search (strong)
open headroom: exact 0/1 DP knapsack over packages, smarter decoy-avoidance, multi-merge global trade-offs
